# Contributing to MicroBank

We follow a professional development workflow:

## Feature Development
1. Create a branch from `develop`.
2. Name it `feat/feature-name`.
3. Open a PR to `develop`.
4. Ensure CI/CD tests pass.

## Main Rules
- Maintain >80% code coverage.
- Document any architectural changes in a new ADR.
- Use explicit commit messages (Conventional Commits recommended).
